name: 06-03-delete-all-tests
title: Delete all test cases at user request
description: 用户明确确认全部删除测试用例后，移除 tests、backend/tests、frontend/scripts 测试脚本、P0 验证脚本与直接测试配置入口。
scope: tests + test scripts + test command wiring

notes: Completed destructive test cleanup per explicit user confirmation. Deleted tests/, backend/tests/, frontend/scripts/, root scripts/, pytest.ini; removed frontend package test script. Validation after deletion: backend compileall PASS, frontend build PASS. No test commands remain by design.
